title: GreenKube FinGreenOps Dashboard
description: FinGreenOps dashboard for Kubernetes — sustainability score, CO₂ emissions (Scope 2 & 3), cloud costs, regional node cleanliness, top namespace impact, pod spend, and realized savings.

panels.title: Sustainability Score Radar
panels.description: Dynamic radar chart for the live GreenKube sustainability score dimensions.

targets.expr: avg(max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_sustainability_dimension_score{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__", dimension="resource_efficiency"}))
avg(max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_sustainability_dimension_score{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__", dimension="carbon_efficiency"}))
avg(max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_sustainability_dimension_score{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__", dimension="waste_elimination"}))
avg(max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_sustainability_dimension_score{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__", dimension="node_efficiency"}))
avg(max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_sustainability_dimension_score{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__", dimension="scaling_practices"}))
avg(max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_sustainability_dimension_score{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__", dimension="carbon_aware_scheduling"}))
avg(max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_sustainability_dimension_score{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__", dimension="stability"}))
avg(max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_sustainability_score{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__"}))

panels.title: Footprint & Cost Mix
panels.description: Grouped ECharts bar chart for operational CO₂e, embodied CO₂e, and cloud cost.

targets.expr: sum(max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_dashboard_summary_co2e_grams_total{cluster=~"$cluster", window="$dashboard_window", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__", scope="scope2"})) or sum(max by (cluster) (greenkube_cluster_co2e_grams_total{cluster=~"$cluster"}))

sum(max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_dashboard_summary_co2e_grams_total{cluster=~"$cluster", window="$dashboard_window", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__", scope="scope3"})) or sum(max by (cluster) (greenkube_cluster_embodied_co2e_grams_total{cluster=~"$cluster"}))

sum(max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_dashboard_summary_cost_dollars_total{cluster=~"$cluster", window="$dashboard_window", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__"})) or sum(max by (cluster) (greenkube_cluster_cost_dollars_total{cluster=~"$cluster"}))

panels.title: GreenKube Impact
panels.description: Grouped ECharts impact strip for realized savings and implemented recommendations.

targets.expr: sum(max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_dashboard_savings_co2e_grams_total{cluster=~"$cluster", window="$dashboard_window", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__", recommendation_type="all"}))

sum(max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_dashboard_savings_cost_dollars_total{cluster=~"$cluster", window="$dashboard_window", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__", recommendation_type="all"}))
sum(max by (cluster, namespace, type) (greenkube_recommendations_implemented_total{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__"}))

panels.title: Action Priorities
panels.description: Grouped ECharts action panel for the top namespaces and recommendation types.

targets.expr: sort_desc(topk(3, sum by (namespace) (max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_dashboard_summary_co2e_grams_total{cluster=~"$cluster", window="$dashboard_window", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__", scope="all"}))))

sort_desc(topk(3, sum by (namespace) (max by (cluster, namespace) (greenkube_dashboard_summary_cost_dollars_total{cluster=~"$cluster", window="$dashboard_window", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__"}))))
topk(3, sum by (type) (max by (cluster, namespace, type, priority) (greenkube_recommendations_total{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", namespace!="__all__"})))
sum by (namespace) (greenkube_namespace_co2e_grams_total{cluster=~"$cluster"})
sum by (namespace) (greenkube_namespace_cost_dollars_total{cluster=~"$cluster"})

panels.title: Node Region Cleanliness Map
panels.description: Regional node map colored by Electricity Maps grid intensity. Marker placement uses the EM zone country lookup, while node labels carry Kubernetes topology zone and region metadata.

targets.expr: avg by (cluster, zone, lookup, nodes, node_count, bubble_size, bubble_label, map_label) (greenkube_zone_grid_intensity_gco2_kwh{cluster=~"$cluster"})
topk(15, max by (namespace, pod) (greenkube_pod_co2e_grams{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}))
topk(15, max by (namespace, pod) (greenkube_pod_cost_dollars{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}))
